summary: P1 Features Testing Complete - Driver path tracking and Admin driver management. All backend tests PASS (10/10). Frontend admin UI verified working: 'Compte' column present, Désactiver/Activer buttons functional with toast notifications.

issues: React hydration warning in console (non-blocking): 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>'

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/stats/drivers returns drivers with is_active field
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/drivers/{id}/status - returns 404 for non-existent driver
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/drivers/{id}/status - returns 403 for non-admin user
✅ Backend: GET /api/rides/{id}/driver-path endpoint exists and validates ride_id
✅ Backend: PUT /api/drivers/location stores path points in ride.driver_path
✅ Backend: GET /api/rides/{id}/driver-path returns 403 for other user's ride
✅ Frontend: 'Compte' column visible in driver table
✅ Frontend: Clicking Désactiver shows toast 'Chauffeur désactivé'
✅ Frontend: Button text changes to 'Activer' after deactivation
✅ Frontend: Clicking Activer shows toast 'Chauffeur activé'
✅ Frontend: PassengerDashboard fetches driver-path for active rides
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing test accounts used
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features (driver path tracking + admin driver management) are fully implemented and tested. The driver path is stored in rides collection when driver updates location during active ride. Admin can toggle driver accounts via PUT /api/admin/drivers/{id}/status. MapComponent renders driver path as blue line. Previous issue from iteration_7 (Stripe invalid API key) may still need attention for payment flow testing.

driver_path_tracking.path_storage: ride.driver_path array in MongoDB (populated by PUT /api/drivers/location)
driver_path_tracking.frontend_component: MapComponent with driverPath prop, renders blue line layer
